hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four symbols are flat with negative composites, zero-to-negative alpha, and elevated vol (0.39-0.55) alongside beta >=0.9 — no exploitable edge and concentrated systematic risk. Counsellors converge on a defensive stance. LTC is the most fragile signal (alpha -0.22, composite -0.36); ETH and SOL are also fragile given high beta/vol with negative alpha. BTC is the least-bad anchor but still lacks a positive signal. Recommend reduced sizing, tight risk limits, and no new directional exposure until composites or breadth improve.
